name: Osmorrow
short_description: An adventure set on the planet of Osmorrow, where the Ogre clan has run rampant. Your mission is to help restore peace and order to this world as you liberate Osmorrow from the Ogre oppression. Use high skilled melee and ranged combat along with swift and precise movement to quell the Ogre threat.
detailed_description:
Adventure Mode


An adventure set on the planet of Osmorrow, where the Ogre clan has run rampant. You are sent to aid the ambassador following reports of massive raids in the city of Esterdron led by the evil Ogres. These invasive Ogre clan raids have been assaulting and enslaving the people of Esterdron. Your mission is to help restore peace and order to this world as you liberate Osmorrow from the Ogre oppression.

Siege Mode


A rogue-like dungeon mode with a simple objective: Get as far as you can. You might find a new weapon around any corner or an enemy might find you instead.

Features


  • Fast Paced combat
  • Sandbox combo system
  • 2 game modes: Adventure, Siege
  • High difficulty and Skill Cap
  • Controller Support

Follow us for announcements of future content.
